title: Betty Blue
tmdbOverview: A lackadaisical handyman and aspiring novelist tries to support his younger girlfriend as she slowly succumbs to madness.
synopsis: Released in 1986, Betty Blue is a drama and romance film from France. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 1980s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
